overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character carrying a large yellow cargo container walking through an arid desert landscape with red sand and sparse vegetation. The character traverses open sandy terrain that gradually transitions into areas with desert shrubs and grasses, with rocky mountain formations visible in the background under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open red sand desert with scattered rocks

agents.ego_description: character carrying large yellow cargo container walking steadily across flat red sand terrain

entered.detail: large rocky mountain formation dominating the horizon with gray-brown peaks
dark rock formations and cliffs on the left side of the landscape
small dark boulders scattered across the red sand surface
expansive reddish-orange sand dunes and flat desert ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an expansive open desert of red sand with scattered black rocks. A large mountain peak dominates the distant center horizon while rocky formations line the left side. The sky is overcast providing diffused lighting across the barren landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert scrubland with scattered bushes and grasses

events.description: game UI text appears in lower left corner indicating delivery completion and rewards

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through increasingly vegetated terrain with desert shrubs and tall grass

entered.detail: low green bushes and scrub vegetation growing in the sandy soil
low green bushes and scrub vegetation growing in the sandy soil
patches of tall beige and green grasses growing between the shrubs

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from open sand into desert scrubland with moderate vegetation including green shrubs and tall grasses. The ground becomes patchier with exposed dirt and sand mixed with plant life. The distant mountain appears closer as the character advances, and game interface text briefly appears indicating mission progress.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a barren red desert that gradually transitions into a more vegetated scrubland. It begins with the character traversing an expansive stretch of red sand dotted with scattered black rocks, while a massive mountain peak dominates the distant horizon under a diffused, overcast sky. As the character advances, the open terrain shifts into a patchier landscape where exposed dirt and sand mix with emerging green shrubs and tall grasses. The scene then expands as the distant mountain appears closer, with mission progress text briefly appearing on the interface before the character fully enters the denser desert vegetation.
